name: Thornfield Crew
specialty: Specializing in infiltration and sabotage, Thornfield Crew has a reputation for disappearing into the Undercity's labyrinthine depths and leaving chaos in their wake.

members.name: Eira Thornfield
members.note: A scar running down her left cheek serves as a constant reminder of a past betrayal.

members.name: Vex Silenshade
members.note: His eyes glow ominously in the dark, a warning to any who might cross their path.

members.name: Zephyr Windrider
members.note: His signature crossbow is adorned with feathers from creatures slain in the Rifts.

visual: Clad in black leather and chainmail, they move with a quiet, purposeful intensity, their faces hidden beneath wide-brimmed hats. A silver serpent coil is etched into the hilt of each member's weapon, a symbol of their Serpent Choir allegiance.
reputation_note: Thornfield Crew is feared for their ruthlessness and unwavering loyalty to the Serpent Choir. Whispers suggest they have connections that reach to the very top.
